titleStmt.title: SII 16.182: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 182. (A.R. No. 682 of 1917.) YEṞṞAGUḌI, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar of the mukhamaṇḍapa in the Vēṇugōpalasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1474, Paridhāvin, Vaiśākha śu. 11, corresponding to 1552 A.D., May 4, (Wednesday).

It registers the grant of their vartana collected from the mahājanas of Yaraguḍi by the vipravinōdins Parvvatayya, Anantayya and Nallārayya, sons of Vallabhayya and grand-sons of Mallayya of Kāśypa-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Śukla-Yajuśśākha and born in the Gobbūrikoṇḍa-kula, to the god Gōpinātha of the place for conducting pānakālu-sēva during the festivals in the month of Vaiśākha, for the merit of the community.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1474 Āgunē
ṭi paridhāvi saṁvatsara vaiśākha śu
dha 11 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīśīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadā
śivadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagara
maṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁ
ḍai pṛdhvīsāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁ
ḍaṁgānu kāśyapagōtra Āpastaṁbha
sūtraṁ śuklayajuśākhādhyā
yulaina gobbūrikoṁḍa kulōdbhavula
Ina śrīmatu vipravinōdi malla
yyaṁgāri pautṛlaina vallabhayya
ṁgāri putṛlaina paruvatayya Anaṁttayya
nallārayyānu yaraguḍi gōpinātaniki I
ccina vipravinōdiva¨rtana dha¨rmmaśāsa
naṁ koṁḍrājuvāri yarraguḍi grā
māna mahājanālu vipravinō
dulaku Ice va¨rtana gōpinātani
vaiśākha tirunāḷaku dēvuni vaḍa
papu pānakālaku mā vipravi
nōdula kulaṁvārikellānu pu
ṇyaṁgānu gōpināthuniki sa
hiraṇyōdakadānadhārā
pū¨rvakamugānu trivācaka
ṁgānu dhāravōśi Isti
mi Ī dha¨rmānaku mā kulā
na yavaru dapinānu mā
namu lēnivāṁḍu mātṛga
manamu sēsina vāṁ
ḍu suṇakamāṁsaṁ su
ra sēviṁcinavāru maṁga
ḷa svasti śrī paruvatayya
Anaṁttayya nallārayyagā
ri vrālu .
Digital edition of SII 16.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
